description: Extensive readings in advanced general and specialized texts in Korean, and discussion on the content of the reading materials. Conducted in Korean. Students with prior experience in the language are required to take a placement test administered by the department. Not open to students with credit for E ASIAN 405 prior to Summer 2019.

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: ASIALANG 306(or E ASIAN 348 prior to Summer 2019) or placement intoASIALANG 405
